title: Email templates available on mobile
excerpt:
Description
We want to be able to send an email from our phone using one of our saved email templates. 
What are you trying to achieve
Being able to use email templates on our phone.

posts.author: Kinseyrayne (Kinsey Sarian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We want to be able to send an email from our phone using one of our saved email templates.

What are you trying to achieve

Being able to use email templates on our phone.

posts.author: JonahScott (Jonah Scott)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, having email templates available on the mobile app would make things much easier. It’s definitely something a lot of users would benefit from. Hopefully the team adds this feature soon—it would streamline work for people who rely on mobile updates.
